title: Fix calculate_discount handling of integer discounts
description: If someone passes discount=10, the current code throws an error because it expects values between 0 and 1. We need it to divide by 100 if the discount is > 1. For example, discount 10 should mean 10% (0.1).

title: Write unit tests for calculate_discount function
description: Add a file `test_main.py` using pytest with at least 3 test cases for `calculate_discount` (normal case, 0% discount, 100% discount).

title: Enhance TelemetryLogger with a new council_rejections metric
description: In `forgeos/observability/telemetry.py`, modify `log_event` and any necessary underlying logic to track the total number of times the Multi-Agent Council rejects a plan. Add a new numeric field `council_rejections` to the JSON payload whenever `event_type == 'council_review'` and `approved == False` is found in the metadata. Do not break existing fields like `issue_number` or `state`.

title: Implement a full authentication system
description: We need a complete authentication system. This involves creating user database models (user.py in models/), a JWT-based authentication utility class (auth.py in core/), and the necessary FastAPI login/register routes (auth_routes.py in api/).
